title: Aerloop Aerloop Ad Poster AI
sourceTitle: Aerloop Aerloop Ad Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 3:4 giant-typography product launch poster for AERLOOP Trail Scent One, built around outdoor smart fragrance diffuser. Subject: Trail Scent One is the crisp hero product for AERLOOP, with realistic material, complete structure, readable silhouette, and clear product scale. outdoor lifestyle model holding the product near a trail map supports the brand mood without stealing focus. Scene: premium outdoor mountain-trail campaign space with misty air, terrain depth, and product-scale perspective typography forms a premium campaign environment linked to the product category. Composition: Fixed product-launch poster system: oversized bold sans-serif EXPLORE becomes the spatial structure, with product, model or usage scene, perspective depth, contact shadows, and foreground/background occlusion integrated into one believable space. Signature Elements: fixed selling points detail appear as 3-5 compact product feature labels near the hero product while the giant title acts as wall, track, tunnel, terrain, sound-wave rail, scent-space, or brand symbol. Style: High-end commercial campaign poster with giant perspective typography, strong layout design, polished product-release energy, realistic materials, unified lighting, sharp detail, and complete information hierarchy. Color Palette: Fixed controlled premium palette chosen around the product concept, with one main color, supporting neutral, small accent color, and polished campaign-grade saturation. Lighting: Unified commercial light, crisp product edges, realistic reflections, atmospheric depth, and sharp material readability. Typography: Top-left brand text "AERLOOP", hero headline "EXPLORE", product name "Trail Scent One", subtitle "Fresh air, carried with you.", campaign micro typography, small labels for fixed selling points detail, product code, date, fine dividers, and decorative barcode-like marks. Restrictions: Single vertical 3:4 campaign poster, source-appropriate brand presentation, clear brand/product/headline text, coherent perspective, complete information system, sharp product detail, polished premium advertising finish.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

imagePrompts.title: Aerloop Aerloop Ad Poster Explore

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 3:4 giant-typography product launch poster for SOMNA Night Wave Mini, built around premium sleep-aid sound speaker. Subject: Night Wave Mini is the crisp hero product for SOMNA, with realistic material, complete structure, readable silhouette, and clear product scale. model-free premium bedside product staging with the speaker as the only hero object supports the brand mood without stealing focus. Scene: minimal premium bedside night scene with soft acoustic wave trails, warm night-light glow, and calm product focus forms a premium campaign environment linked to the product category. Composition: Fixed product-launch poster system: oversized bold sans-serif SOUND becomes the spatial structure, with product, model or usage scene, perspective depth, contact shadows, and foreground/background occlusion integrated into one believable space. Signature Elements: fixed selling points detail appear as 3-5 compact product feature labels near the hero product while the giant title acts as wall, track, tunnel, terrain, sound-wave rail, scent-space, or brand symbol. Style: High-end commercial campaign poster with giant perspective typography, strong layout design, polished product-release energy, realistic materials, unified lighting, sharp detail, and complete information hierarchy. Color Palette: Fixed controlled premium palette chosen around the product concept, with one main color, supporting neutral, small accent color, and polished campaign-grade saturation. Lighting: Unified commercial light, crisp product edges, realistic reflections, atmospheric depth, and sharp material readability. Typography: Top-left brand text "SOMNA", hero headline "SOUND", product name "Night Wave Mini", subtitle "Let the room slow down.", campaign micro typography, small labels for fixed selling points detail, product code, date, fine dividers, and decorative barcode-like marks. Restrictions: Single vertical 3:4 campaign poster, source-appropriate brand presentation, clear brand/product/headline text, coherent perspective, complete information system, sharp product detail, polished premium advertising finish.
